title: Evidence
description: A single dated, tiered piece of evidence cited by a candidate card, a ledger admission, or a belief update. The source tier governs whether it may move confidence: tertiary (social/forum) is idea-seed only and can never move a conclusion on its own.

summary.description: One-line factual claim the source supports.

tier.description: primary = filings/official; secondary = trade press/analyst; market_implied = prices/positioning; tertiary = social/forum (idea-seed only, cannot move a conclusion alone).

date.description: ISO-8601 date the fact is as-of (YYYY-MM-DD).
